description: After logging the calendar-verification-skip error, still proposed 'may be done — worth confirming?' for past-due OmniFocus tasks instead of committing to self-verification. Half-fixed the rule.
correction: David: never ask him to confirm past-due task status. Check OmniFocus completion field directly. If task shows completed:false but due date is past, that is a data staleness problem to resolve autonomously — not a question to surface.
systemic_fix: Hard rule: past-due OmniFocus tasks are NEVER surfaced as questions for David. Jarvis checks the completion status autonomously. If uncertain, skip it rather than ask.
